task: Put the multi USB charging cable in the gray box
raw:
Scene: multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box, shelf
Step 1: reach(multi_USB_charging_cable)
  affordance_region: the multi USB charging cable
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, multi_USB_charging_cable, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, multi_USB_charging_cable) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(multi_USB_charging_cable)
  affordance_region: the body of the multi USB charging cable
  contact: holding(multi_USB_charging_cable) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(multi_USB_charging_cable)
Step 3: transport(multi_USB_charging_cable -> gray_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the gray box
  spatial: above(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(multi_USB_charging_cable)
  done_when: above(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box, 0.05)
Step 4: place(multi_USB_charging_cable -> gray_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the gray box
  contact: surface_contact(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box) [completion]; released(multi_USB_charging_cable) [completion]
  pose: stable(multi_USB_charging_cable) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box) AND released(multi_USB_charging_cable) AND stable(multi_USB_charging_cable)
<END_OF_PLAN>
